title: Senior Financial Analyst - FreeCharge - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - FreeCharge - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!
